use_cases: Displaying notification menus triggered by bell icon buttons
Showing contextual information in floating panels above trigger elements
Providing accessible popover dialogs with arrow indicators
Implementing dismissible tooltip-style content with smooth transitions
Creating notification center UIs with title and description content
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist popover component from Base UI that displays notifications in a floating panel with smooth scale/opacity entry and exit animations. Features an arrow indicator, dark mode support, and accessible keyboard focus states. The composite component includes trigger, popup, arrow, title, and description sub-components for building notification dropdowns and contextual menus.
